title: EZtrade
subtitle: Risk, Entry, SL → Position & R:R
alert_fill: Please fill Risk, Entry and SL
no_trades_hint: Save your first trade from the calculator
no_templates_hint: Save your favorite trade strategies for one-tap use
tip_risk: Max dollar amount you are willing to lose on this trade
tip_entry: The price you plan to buy at
tip_sl: Stop Loss: if price drops here, sell automatically to limit loss
tip_tp: Take Profit: the price you plan to sell at for profit
tip_tp_pct: % of position to sell at this target. Last target auto-fills the remainder
tip_ticker: Enter stock symbol like AAPL (Apple) or TSLA (Tesla)
tip_rr: Risk/Reward = potential profit ÷ potential loss. Above 1 means reward > risk
ob_desc: 3 steps to your first trade calculation:
ob_step1: 1. Enter your Risk Amount (how much you can lose)
ob_step3: 3. Hit Calculate → see how many shares to buy
sign_in_hint: Sign in to sync trades across devices.
landing_tagline: The Smartest Way to Size Your Trades
landing_subtitle: Built for traders, by traders. Calculate position size, track your trades, and improve your edge — all in one app.
landing_trust: No credit card required • 7-day free trial • 7-day money-back guarantee
landing_features_title: Everything You Need to Trade Smarter
landing_features_sub: Built by traders, for traders. Every feature is designed to help you manage risk and stay disciplined.
landing_feat_calc_desc: Calculate exactly how many shares to buy based on your risk tolerance
landing_feat_rr_desc: Set up to 5 take-profit targets with automatic percentage distribution
landing_feat_journal_desc: Log every trade with tags, notes, and screenshots. Never forget a setup.
landing_feat_sync_desc: Access your trades from any device. Phone, tablet, desktop — always in sync.
landing_feat_lang_desc: Trade in your language. 繁體中文, 日本語, 한국어, Español, and 8 more.
landing_feat_price_desc: Real-time price feeds auto-fill your entry price. No more switching apps.
landing_journal_title: Traders With a Journal Are 30% More Likely to Be Profitable
landing_journal_desc: Studies show that traders who consistently log their trades improve their win rate by an average of 12% within 3 months.
landing_journal_cta: EZtrade gives you the tools to track every trade, analyze your patterns, and find your edge.
landing_how_sub: Get from zero to your first trade in under a minute.
landing_step1_desc: Create your account in 10 seconds. No credit card needed.
landing_step2_desc: Enter risk, entry, and stop loss. Get position size and R:R instantly.
landing_step3_desc: Log trades, review stats, and watch your edge grow over time.
landing_pricing_subtitle: Start with a 7-day free trial. Upgrade when you're ready.
landing_refund_desc: Not satisfied? Email us within 7 days for a full refund. No questions asked.
landing_faq1_a: Yes! Start with a 7-day free trial with full Pro features. After that, the free tier includes 5 calculations per day and 2 saved trades.
landing_faq2_a: Stocks, futures (NQ, ES, GC, CL and more), and ETFs. We support all US-listed securities.
landing_faq3_q: Can I use EZtrade on my phone?
landing_faq3_a: Yes! EZtrade is a Progressive Web App. Add it to your home screen and use it like a native app.
landing_faq4_a: Absolutely. We use Firebase with bank-level encryption. Your data is synced securely and only accessible by you.
landing_faq5_a: Yes. Cancel anytime from your account settings. Plus, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee.
landing_faq6_a: We support 12 languages: English, 繁體中文, 简体中文, 日本語, 한국어, Español, Português, हिन्दी, Deutsch, ไทย, Bahasa Indonesia, and Français.
landing_final_subtitle: Join thousands of traders who calculate with confidence.
landing_footer_updates: Constant updates • World-class support • Community-driven development
